objective: Implement JWT-based authentication middleware with role-based access control

context.problem: API endpoints lack authentication and authorization. Anyone can access sensitive user data without proper credentials or permission checks.
context.why_now: Security audit flagged this as critical vulnerability. Production deployment blocked until auth is implemented.
previous_attempts: Tried basic auth - doesn't support token refresh or role-based permissions
Evaluated OAuth2 libraries - too complex for current requirements
dependencies: User database schema must be finalized
JWT secret must be configured in environment

deliverables.description: JWT authentication middleware with token validation and role checking
deliverables.validation: Must pass type checking and unit tests with 90%+ coverage

deliverables.description: Comprehensive test suite covering valid tokens, expired tokens, invalid signatures, and role-based access
Usage guide with examples of applying middleware to routes and configuring roles
deliverables.validation: Must include setup instructions, API examples, and troubleshooting section

success_criteria: Middleware correctly validates JWT tokens and rejects invalid/expired tokens
Role-based access control blocks unauthorized users from protected routes
All unit tests pass with >= 90% code coverage
Documentation includes clear setup and usage examples
No security vulnerabilities detected by security-architect review

required_tests.expected_outcome: TypeScript compilation succeeds with no errors

examples.input: Valid JWT token with 'admin' role accessing admin-only endpoint
examples.output: Request proceeds to route handler; user object attached to request context
examples.explanation: Demonstrates successful authentication and authorization flow

examples.input: Expired JWT token accessing any protected endpoint
examples.explanation: Shows proper handling of expired tokens

examples.input: Valid JWT token with 'user' role accessing admin-only endpoint

sections.description: Step-by-step reasoning: analyze requirements, consider edge cases, plan implementation approach
Complete middleware code with inline comments explaining security decisions
Test suite covering all success and failure scenarios
Self-check against success criteria and security best practices
Test output, lint results, type check results, build output, and coverage report

tests_created.description: Whether test file was created with passing tests

security_review_passed.description: Whether security review found no critical vulnerabilities
